audioRecorderModal.title: Voice Recorder
audioRecorderModal.subtitle: Record your lectures, ideas, or important reminders.
audioRecorderModal.permissionError: Microphone permission is required to record audio

ai.transcriptionHint: Transcribe the recorded audio using AI. Great for reviewing lectures or searching for key moments.
ai.summaryHint: Get a smart summary of the audio. Perfect for quickly reviewing main ideas.
ai.tutorialBody: Tap the icons to switch between the full transcription and the AI-generated summary. You can copy the text or search for keywords.
ai.downloadingModelDesc: The first time may take a few minutes. Please don't close the app.
ai.error: An error occurred while processing the audio. Please try again.
ai.emptyTranscription: No transcription yet. Tap to generate.
ai.emptySummary: No summary yet. Tap to generate.

audioRecorderModal.emptyState: Press the red button to start recording your first voice note.

studyTimerModal.title: Study Session
studyTimerModal.subtitle: Focus on a subject without distractions.
studyTimerModal.advanceQuestion: How much did you advance in this session?
studyTimerModal.breakSuggestion: You've been focused for 45 minutes. Would you like to take a short break?

documentScannerModal.title: Document Scanner
documentScannerModal.subtitle: Digitize your notes with professional quality.
documentScannerModal.positionParallel: Place your device parallel to the paper
documentScannerModal.positionSubtitle: The cropping algorithm works best when you take the photo directly from above, without tilting.

schedulePlanner.selectSubjectHint: Select a subject to start adding time blocks.
schedulePlanner.saveError: We could not save your schedule changes.

quickAddMenu.title: Quick Add
quickAddMenu.registerGradeSubtext: Record a new grade in your history
quickAddMenu.newTaskSubtext: Add a reminder or pending item
quickAddMenu.cameraSoonMessage: Photo scan will be available in the next update.

camera.permissionError: Camera permissions are required to continue

grade.title: Register Grade
grade.subject: Subject
grade.name: Assessment Name
grade.offlineSuccess: Grade saved offline for {{subject}} — will sync when connected
grade.errorSave: We could not save this grade. Please try again.

task.title: New Task
task.name: Task Description
task.offlineSuccess: Task saved offline — will sync when connected
task.errorSave: We could not save this task. Please try again.

errors.fillFields: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.cameraPermission: Camera permissions are required to continue.

newSubject.title: New subject
newSubject.subtitle: Set the academic baseline for this course.
newSubject.name: Subject name
newSubject.emptyState: You do not have subjects yet. Tap + to create the first one.

noScheduleAssigned: No schedule assigned â€” tap the grid to add

heroTooltips.globalHealth: Average knowledge retention percentage across all your active subjects. Calculated based on time since your last review and how difficult each topic is for you.
heroTooltips.momentum: Measures recent study activity in this subject (last 4 weeks). 100% = consistent studying. Decreases when you skip studying for several days.
heroTooltips.knowledge: Percentage of knowledge retained in this subject based on the spaced repetition algorithm. Considers number of reviews, topic difficulty, and time elapsed.
